review: having the app allows you to get apps which is good but the people in charge are intellectually disabled and only allow you to use points for 1 item at a time. intentionally making it difficult to redeem points is next level low, even for mc Donald's.

If you order from the app and you don't receive your order or if it's missing items (which happens 25-50% of the time), they will not refund you or offer any kind of support. When you call their customer support, they will tell you there is no option in their system to refund an order even if it was never delivered. Be aware, if the driver steals your entire family's order, McDonald's will keep your money. They stole 115$ from us, don't make the same mistake we did
